signals.headline: Current prediction market status:** The Polymarket for a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire by April 30, 2026 stands at **1% proba
signals.raw: Current prediction market status:** The Polymarket for a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire by April 30, 2026 stands at **1% probability for "Yes"** (98.7% consensus "No")[1]. This reflects trader assessment that ongoing escalation, irreconcilable diplomatic demands, continued Russian frontline advances, and the absence of scheduled peace talks make a ceasefire by month-end highly unlikely[1].
